messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

What is the goal of semantic segmentation in computer vision?
A) Detecting objects and their boundaries
B) Classifying objects in an image
C) Assigning a label to each pixel in an image
D) Estimating depth information
The goal of semantic segmentation in computer vision is to assign a label to each pixel in an image. Therefore, the correct answer is C) Assigning a label to each pixel in an image.
You're welcome! If you have any more questions, feel free to ask.
